items.title: Half of Claude users say AI can already handle half their work according to Anthropic survey
items.summary: About half of Claude users say AI can already handle 50 percent or more of their work tasks, according to a survey of roughly 9,700 users by Anthropic. In 12 months, 26 percent expect AI to cover 60 to 90 percent of their work. Early-career workers worry the most, while the heaviest users are the most optimistic about their career prospects. items.title: J.P. Morgan sees a pile of red flags in the AI market
items.summary: J.P. Morgan warns that there are "signs of investor exuberance" in AI markets. Just 42 AI companies in the S&P 500 account for 65 to 80 percent of the index's total profits. The semiconductor rally is flashing technical patterns last seen during the dotcom bubble, and leveraged chip ETFs have quintupled their market influence since early 2024. The bank sees multiple layers of concentration risk across markets, infras

items.title: The companies most likely to automate your job are now funding a $1 billion program to retrain you
items.summary: Former US Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo has launched "Raise Us," a bipartisan nonprofit to prepare American workers for AI-driven job shifts. Amazon, Anthropic, Microsoft, and the OpenAI Foundation are jointly funding the initiative. It matches Qwen2.5 at the base level but falls behind after fine-tuning. The article ByteDance's "iLLaDA" is a diffusion language model that keeps up with Qwen2.5 appeared first on The Decoder .

items.title: LINE布局AI應用 推社群訊息總結與違規過濾迎戰海量數據【專訪】
items.summary: （中央社記者吳家豪台北27日電）人工智慧（AI）浪潮席捲全球科技圈，通訊軟體LINE如何將AI融入龐大生態系備受關注。LINE台灣入口與內容事業群總經理張景雯接受中央社專訪時表示，LINE的AI應用聚焦「數據應用」、「內容生成」與「內容營運」3大領域，並已實質導入社群訊息總結與後台違規過濾。

items.title: 聊什麼更重要 LINE社群靠凝聚力圈粉拒絕演算法綁架【專訪】
items.summary: （中央社記者吳家豪台北27日電）通訊軟體LINE在台灣用戶超過2200萬人，黏著度極高，旗下「LINE社群」近年快速崛起。LINE台灣入口與內容事業群總經理張景雯接受中央社專訪指出，LINE社群以主題為核心且不受演算法綁架，未來變現策略將在廣告與使用者體驗間取得平衡，甚至已在研擬無廣告方案。

items.title: 美同意Anthropic部分開放最先進模型 僅限信任夥伴
items.summary: （中央社華盛頓26日綜合外電報導）根據路透社看到的美國商務部信函，當局今天批准人工智慧（AI）新創公司Anthropic向部分「可信賴合作夥伴」（trusted partners）釋出旗下功能強大的Claude Mythos 5人工智慧（AI）模型。

items.title: Build interactive PDF text extraction from Amazon S3
items.summary: In this post, you’ll build a server that extracts text from PDF files in Amazon S3 in real time. This protocol-based approach provides programmatic document access. You’ll walk through the architecture, set up the server, and run interactive document queries. Along the way, you’ll compare this approach with Amazon Textract so you can decide which tool fits your workload.

items.title: How Cara pioneers domain-specific AI for enterprise insurance brokerages with AWS
items.summary: In this post, we explore how Cara, built in cooperation with AWS, addresses these challenges. We walk through the technical design decisions and the AWS services that support the solution. We also share measurable outcomes Cara has delivered for enterprise brokerages.

items.title: Production-grade AI agents for financial compliance: Lessons from Stripe
items.summary: In this post, you learn how Stripe built a production-grade AI agent system for financial compliance. We cover the technical architecture of Stripe’s ReAct agent framework and the infrastructure decisions behind a dedicated agent service. items.title: 韓媒：三星計劃10年砸20兆元 推動區域產業升級
items.summary: （中央社首爾26日綜合外電報導）韓國媒體報導，三星集團（Samsung Group）將於29日宣布，未來10年在韓國投資1000兆韓元（約新台幣20.6兆元），其中可能有300兆韓元用於韓國西南部興建晶片廠。

items.title: 台灣研究日魯汶登場 聚焦社會科學與人文領域
items.summary: （中央社記者吳柏緯布魯塞爾25日專電）「比利時－台灣社會科學與人文研究日」25日起一連兩天在魯汶舉行。今年的台灣研究日以社會科學為核心主題，議題涵蓋循環經濟與建築永續、當代哲學與民主韌性，同時也討論AI與法治的關係，以及對於文學閱讀的衝擊。
